'''âh-k-h''' ('''kahakah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hecatomb|hecatomb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hecatomb|hecatomb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-k-h
|-
! Lemma
| kahakah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihakah|thihakah]] || [[word:jihakah|jihakah]] || [[word:shihakah|shihakah]] || [[word:kihakah|kihakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhakah|thuthuhakah]] || [[word:jujuhakah|jujuhakah]] || [[word:shushuhakah|shushuhakah]] || [[word:kukuhakah|kukuhakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhakah|thuhakah]] || [[word:juhakah|juhakah]] || [[word:shuhakah|shuhakah]] || [[word:kuhakah|kuhakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhakah|thuhakah]] || [[word:juhakah|juhakah]] || [[word:shuhakah|shuhakah]] || [[word:kuhakah|kuhakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehakah|thehakah]] || [[word:jehakah|jehakah]] || [[word:shehakah|shehakah]] || [[word:kehakah|kehakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohakah|thothohakah]] || [[word:jojohakah|jojohakah]] || [[word:shoshohakah|shoshohakah]] || [[word:kokohakah|kokohakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohakah|thohakah]] || [[word:johakah|johakah]] || [[word:shohakah|shohakah]] || [[word:kohakah|kohakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohakah|thohakah]] || [[word:johakah|johakah]] || [[word:shohakah|shohakah]] || [[word:kohakah|kohakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhakah|thĂŠhakah]] || [[word:jĂŠhakah|jĂŠhakah]] || [[word:shĂŠhakah|shĂŠhakah]] || [[word:kĂŠhakah|kĂŠhakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahakah|thathahakah]] || [[word:jajahakah|jajahakah]] || [[word:shashahakah|shashahakah]] || [[word:kakahakah|kakahakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahakah|thahakah]] || [[word:jahakah|jahakah]] || [[word:shahakah|shahakah]] || [[word:kahakah|kahakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahakah|thahakah]] || [[word:jahakah|jahakah]] || [[word:shahakah|shahakah]] || [[word:kahakah|kahakah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahakah|shahakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahakah|goshahakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahakah|gokishahakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahakahnĂŒ|shahakahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahakahnknĂŒ|goshahakahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahakahnĂŒ|gokishahakahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahakahshĂ«|shahakahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahakahnkshĂ«|goshahakahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahakahshĂ«|gokishahakahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahakahro|shahakahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahakahnkro|goshahakahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahakahro|gokishahakahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahakahmu|shahakahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahakahnkmu|goshahakahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahakahmu|gokishahakahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahakahsher|shahakahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahakahnksher|goshahakahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahakahsher|gokishahakahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahakahng|shahakahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahakahnkng|goshahakahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahakahng|gokishahakahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahakahya|shahakahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahakahnkya|goshahakahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahakahya|gokishahakahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahakahyam|shahakahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahakahnkyam|goshahakahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahakahyam|gokishahakahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahakahnĂŒshĂ«|shahakahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahakahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahakahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahakahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahakahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahakahnĂŒro|shahakahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahakahnknĂŒro|goshahakahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahakahnĂŒro|gokishahakahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahakahnĂŒmu|shahakahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahakahnknĂŒmu|goshahakahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahakahnĂŒmu|gokishahakahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahakahshĂ«nĂŒ|shahakahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahakahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahakahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahakahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahakahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahakahshĂ«ro|shahakahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahakahnkshĂ«ro|goshahakahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahakahshĂ«ro|gokishahakahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahakahshĂ«mu|shahakahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahakahnkshĂ«mu|goshahakahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahakahshĂ«mu|gokishahakahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahakahronĂŒ|shahakahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahakahnkronĂŒ|goshahakahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahakahronĂŒ|gokishahakahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahakahroshĂ«|shahakahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahakahnkroshĂ«|goshahakahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahakahroshĂ«|gokishahakahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahakahromu|shahakahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahakahnkromu|goshahakahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahakahromu|gokishahakahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahakahmunĂŒ|shahakahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahakahnkmunĂŒ|goshahakahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahakahmunĂŒ|gokishahakahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahakahmushĂ«|shahakahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahakahnkmushĂ«|goshahakahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahakahmushĂ«|gokishahakahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahakahmuro|shahakahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahakahnkmuro|goshahakahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahakahmuro|gokishahakahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
